Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}The third semester is almost over. After spring vacation ends, we'll be third-years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}And when that happens, we can't take it easy anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 313}I think we were talking about this before, too—during the third semester of our first year?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}Yeah, the year flew by way too quickly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I need to start studying more seriously soon if I want to get into a good college...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 314}I think I said the same thing last year, too. Guess I haven't grown up at all since then...[n]{f 1 1}
